summary: The ingestion of the google_trends_strepsils feature set yielded 262 rows of data representing a single signal, spanning from 27 June 2021 to 28 June 2026, with no missing values (missing‑value fraction = 0.0). This dataset contributes to respiratory‑surveillance monitoring of Strepsils‑related search trends.
